parsed.summary: The provided context only includes the commit log, diff statistics, and a list of changed files. The actual file diffs are not included in the prompt, making it impossible to review the logic, error handling, or correctness of the changes. Based strictly on the provided context, there is no evidence of defects, so no material findings are reported. To perform a substantive review, the full diff content would be required.
next_steps: Provide the full file diffs in the prompt to enable a thorough code review.
Once the diff is available, focus on the new scripts (repo-checks.mjs, review-structural.mjs) and client rendering changes for error handling and edge cases.
